live_gates.title: Phase 0 external-readiness chain is clear
live_gates.reason: Phase 0 entry remains withheld, so no real provider mutation may start.

live_gates.title: Provider is on the seq_034 shortlist
live_gates.reason: Only shortlisted providers may be configured later.

live_gates.title: Region policy is explicit
live_gates.reason: Provider project creation stays blocked until region posture is named.

live_gates.title: Retention and deletion policy is explicit
live_gates.reason: Deletion or retention cannot be inferred from job completion.

live_gates.title: Webhook security and replay controls are ready
live_gates.reason: Unsigned or replayed callbacks must stay non-authoritative.

live_gates.title: Bucket or storage scope is declared
live_gates.reason: Storage and prefix scope are part of the scanning contract.

live_gates.title: Quarantine policy is frozen
live_gates.reason: Clean, suspicious, unreadable, and failed branches cannot collapse into one badge.

live_gates.title: Named approver and target environment are present
live_gates.reason: Live mutations require a named human approver and environment target.

live_gates.title: ALLOW_REAL_PROVIDER_MUTATION is true
live_gates.reason: Real provider changes must fail closed without the mutation flag.

live_gates.title: ALLOW_SPEND is true for billable actions
live_gates.reason: Project creation and live traffic can incur spend immediately.

live_gates.title: Final operator acknowledgement is captured
live_gates.reason: Real project setup is blocked until a human acknowledges the live posture and artifact sensitivity.
